author: ben_a_adams
content: Is glamsterdam-devnet-5 just Nethermind and Ethrex?

author: edgl_dev
content:
I pushed an update to improve blob inclusion on ethrex, but it seems this caused grandine to lose all peers, maybe it could be a bug in grandine?

It held a stable 14 consensus peers for the whole half-hour before, then went 14 ->  0 the minute the EL restarted, and hasn't recovered in ~22 min

author: edgl_dev
content: and so it isnt driving the engine api anymore

author: povilas8490
content:
ethrex invalidated good payload, that's why Grandine stopped:

```
[2026-06-05T07:04:24.383Z]  WARN eth1_api::execution_service:209: engine_newPayload returned INVALID status (beacon_block_root: 0x147035138f99152c7ad25e2a3327ed01da5740d6630d56b6c93eabeed0e65cd3, block_number: 5356, block_hash: 0x22502acb99f433bb898dea3d9ef2419db0f5d09ec89a8d044cfb15d44f56bb31, response: PayloadStatusV1 { status: Invalid, latest_valid_hash: Some(0x95993bc553bf82c0a4522f53278dc2337238700920071272e1514c7abc4df9b1), validation_error: Some("DB error: state root missing") }) peers=[14/200]
```
